states.name: active
states.description: Node is enrolled and may be considered for new work when authorization, reachability, health, capability and resource evidence also pass.
entry_requirements: Approved enrollment and current trust policy are recorded.

states.name: draining
states.description: Node keeps existing authorized work but receives no ordinary new work.
entry_requirements: Drain authority, deadline and workload handling policy are recorded.

states.name: quarantined
states.description: Node is isolated from ordinary work pending investigation or remediation.
entry_requirements: Quarantine reason, scope and policy are retained.

states.name: suspended
states.description: Node authority is temporarily disabled without retiring identity/history.
entry_requirements: Suspension reason and authority are retained.

states.name: revoked
states.description: Node enrollment/trust authority has been revoked and new work is forbidden.
entry_requirements: Revocation and credential/lease fencing evidence are retained.

states.name: retired
states.description: Node identity is retained for history but no future work is allowed.
entry_requirements: Retirement, cleanup and retained-reference policy are recorded.

required_preconditions: Enrollment remains approved; trust, remediation and policy checks pass.
No-new-work policy and handling of active leases/Activities are recorded.
Active work has stopped, migrated or been explicitly retained under policy.
Reason, scope, network/provider restrictions and workload handling are fixed.
New dispatch is blocked and active authority is reconciled.
Enrollment, credentials, reservations and leases are revoked or fenced.
No active leases remain and historical retention/cleanup is recorded.
